diagrams.title: Karatsuba Integer Splitting
diagrams.description: Shows how a number is split into two halves in Karatsuba algorithm
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how divide-and-conquer works for integer multiplication

diagrams.title: Strassen Matrix Partitioning
diagrams.description: Shows how matrices are partitioned into 4 quadrants for divide-and-conquer
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing matrix blocks used in Strassen algorithm

diagrams.title: Recurrence Tree Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows the recurrence tree depths for Karatsuba vs naive multiplication
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why Karatsuba is faster asymptotically
